'''âs-th-j''' ('''kasathaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhetorise|rhetorise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-th-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhetorise|rhetorise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-th-j
|-
! Lemma
| kasathaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisathaj|thisathaj]] || [[word:jisathaj|jisathaj]] || [[word:shisathaj|shisathaj]] || [[word:kisathaj|kisathaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusathaj|thuthusathaj]] || [[word:jujusathaj|jujusathaj]] || [[word:shushusathaj|shushusathaj]] || [[word:kukusathaj|kukusathaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusathaj|thusathaj]] || [[word:jusathaj|jusathaj]] || [[word:shusathaj|shusathaj]] || [[word:kusathaj|kusathaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusathaj|thusathaj]] || [[word:jusathaj|jusathaj]] || [[word:shusathaj|shusathaj]] || [[word:kusathaj|kusathaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesathaj|thesathaj]] || [[word:jesathaj|jesathaj]] || [[word:shesathaj|shesathaj]] || [[word:kesathaj|kesathaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosathaj|thothosathaj]] || [[word:jojosathaj|jojosathaj]] || [[word:shoshosathaj|shoshosathaj]] || [[word:kokosathaj|kokosathaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosathaj|thosathaj]] || [[word:josathaj|josathaj]] || [[word:shosathaj|shosathaj]] || [[word:kosathaj|kosathaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosathaj|thosathaj]] || [[word:josathaj|josathaj]] || [[word:shosathaj|shosathaj]] || [[word:kosathaj|kosathaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsathaj|thĂŠsathaj]] || [[word:jĂŠsathaj|jĂŠsathaj]] || [[word:shĂŠsathaj|shĂŠsathaj]] || [[word:kĂŠsathaj|kĂŠsathaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasathaj|thathasathaj]] || [[word:jajasathaj|jajasathaj]] || [[word:shashasathaj|shashasathaj]] || [[word:kakasathaj|kakasathaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasathaj|thasathaj]] || [[word:jasathaj|jasathaj]] || [[word:shasathaj|shasathaj]] || [[word:kasathaj|kasathaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasathaj|thasathaj]] || [[word:jasathaj|jasathaj]] || [[word:shasathaj|shasathaj]] || [[word:kasathaj|kasathaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasathaj|shasathaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasathaj|goshasathaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasathaj|gokishasathaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasathajnĂŒ|shasathajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasathajnknĂŒ|goshasathajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasathajnĂŒ|gokishasathajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasathajshĂ«|shasathajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasathajnkshĂ«|goshasathajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasathajshĂ«|gokishasathajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasathajro|shasathajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasathajnkro|goshasathajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasathajro|gokishasathajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasathajmu|shasathajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasathajnkmu|goshasathajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasathajmu|gokishasathajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasathajsher|shasathajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasathajnksher|goshasathajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasathajsher|gokishasathajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasathajng|shasathajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasathajnkng|goshasathajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasathajng|gokishasathajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasathajya|shasathajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasathajnkya|goshasathajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasathajya|gokishasathajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasathajyam|shasathajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasathajnkyam|goshasathajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasathajyam|gokishasathajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasathajnĂŒshĂ«|shasathajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasathajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasathajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasathajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasathajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasathajnĂŒro|shasathajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasathajnknĂŒro|goshasathajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasathajnĂŒro|gokishasathajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasathajnĂŒmu|shasathajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasathajnknĂŒmu|goshasathajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasathajnĂŒmu|gokishasathajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasathajshĂ«nĂŒ|shasathajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasathajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasathajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasathajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasathajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasathajshĂ«ro|shasathajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasathajnkshĂ«ro|goshasathajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasathajshĂ«ro|gokishasathajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasathajshĂ«mu|shasathajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasathajnkshĂ«mu|goshasathajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasathajshĂ«mu|gokishasathajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasathajronĂŒ|shasathajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasathajnkronĂŒ|goshasathajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasathajronĂŒ|gokishasathajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasathajroshĂ«|shasathajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasathajnkroshĂ«|goshasathajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasathajroshĂ«|gokishasathajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasathajromu|shasathajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasathajnkromu|goshasathajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasathajromu|gokishasathajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasathajmunĂŒ|shasathajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasathajnkmunĂŒ|goshasathajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasathajmunĂŒ|gokishasathajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasathajmushĂ«|shasathajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasathajnkmushĂ«|goshasathajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasathajmushĂ«|gokishasathajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasathajmuro|shasathajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasathajnkmuro|goshasathajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasathajmuro|gokishasathajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
